Class AthletePhysiology.PhysiologicalState

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.social.sports.AthletePhysiology.PhysiologicalState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AthletePhysiology
public static class AthletePhysiology.PhysiologicalState extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a snapshot of an athlete's physiological condition.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    PhysiologicalState()
    Initializes a state representing a healthy, resting athlete.

      public double getOverallCondition()
      Calculates an aggregate physical condition score.
      Returns:
      average score (0-100)

    • isExhausted

      public boolean isExhausted()
      Checks if the athlete is critically exhausted.
      Returns:
      true if stamina or glycogen is critically low

    • isDehydrated

      public boolean isDehydrated()
      Checks if the athlete is dehydrated.
      Returns:
      true if hydration is below 20%
